message:
feat(rchd): Enhance daemon UI with metrics and worker status displays

Improves the rchd daemon's terminal UI with dedicated panels for metrics
visualization and worker health status. Provides operators better visibility
into compilation queue state and worker utilization.

- Add ui/metrics.rs for budget and throughput visualization
- Add ui/workers.rs for worker status and capability display
- Enhance health.rs with additional health check endpoints
- Improve main.rs UI layout and refresh logic
- Refine selection.rs worker selection algorithms
- Update metrics/budget.rs and metrics/mod.rs for new displays

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
